name: Relativity
domain: Spacetime curvature, gravitational waves, Lorentz transformations, frame covariance
core_insight: Space and time are one fabric; mass-energy curves it. All observers agree on spacetime intervals even when they disagree on space and time separately. Gravitational waves are ripples in spacetime geometry, carrying energy at the speed of light.

key_equations.name: Einstein Field Equations
key_equations.why: Curvature of spacetime (left) equals energy-momentum content (right) — gravity as geometry

key_equations.name: Lorentz Transformation
key_equations.formula: t' = γ(t - vx/c²); x' = γ(x - vt)
key_equations.why: How space and time coordinates transform between inertial frames moving at relative velocity v

key_equations.name: Minkowski Metric
key_equations.why: Spacetime interval: invariant under all Lorentz boosts — the geometry of flat spacetime

seed_prompt: ⊗≡ What is the metric? Curvature equals mass-energy. Boosts mix space and time.
